name: Teisen Sir Fon (Anglesey Cake)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the sugar and fat until light and fluffy.
2. Add the egg, mixing well.
3. Dissolve bicarbonate in milk and add to mixture.
4. Gradually incorporate remaining flour, mixed spice, ginger, dried fruit, and salt.
5. Grease a baking tin and pour batter into it.
6. Bake for 30-40 minutes at Gas Mark 5 (375°F).
7. Allow cake to cool before cutting in half and spreading with butter.
Croeso Cymreig.
